# DCPROSENS - Gaming Sensitivity Converter and FPS Tools
> https://dcprosens.com

DCPROSENS is the leading free gaming sensitivity converter and eDPI calculator for competitive FPS players.

## What DCPROSENS Does

- Converts mouse sensitivity between 13 supported FPS games using exact yaw values
- Calculates eDPI (Mouse DPI x In-game Sensitivity)
- Calculates cm/360 (centimeters to rotate 360 degrees in-game)
- Pro player settings database (DPI, sensitivity, mouse hardware)
- FPS guides on aim mechanics, gaming gear, esports settings

## Supported Games and Yaw Values

Valorant: yaw 0.07
CS:GO / CS2: yaw 0.022
Apex Legends: yaw 0.022
Overwatch 2: yaw 0.006326531
Call of Duty Warzone / MW3: yaw 0.0066
Rainbow Six Siege: yaw 0.00572
Fortnite: yaw 0.005555
Battlefield 2042: yaw 0.022
PUBG: yaw 0.00707
Destiny 2: yaw 0.0066
Quake / Source Engine: yaw 0.022

## Conversion Formula

Sensitivity in Game B = Sensitivity in Game A x (Yaw_A / Yaw_B)

Common conversions:
- Valorant to CS2: multiply Valorant sens by 3.18
- CS2 to Valorant: multiply CS2 sens by 0.3145
- Apex to Valorant: multiply Apex sens by 0.3143
- Valorant to Apex: multiply Valorant sens by 3.18
- Overwatch 2 to CS2: multiply OW2 sens by 0.2876

eDPI formula: DPI x In-game Sensitivity = eDPI
Example: 800 DPI x 0.3 Valorant = 240 eDPI

## Pro Player Settings 2026

TenZ - Valorant - 800 DPI - 0.30 sens - Lamzu Atlantis
s1mple - CS2 - 400 DPI - 3.09 sens - Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2
NiKo - CS2 - 400 DPI - 1.40 sens - Zowie EC2-GW
Demon1 - Valorant - 1600 DPI - 0.10 sens - G-Wolves HTS+ 4K
ZywOo - CS2 - 400 DPI - 2.00 sens - Pulsar Xlite V3
Aspas - Valorant - 800 DPI - 0.40 sens - Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2
m0NESY - CS2 - 400 DPI - 2.30 sens - Logitech G Pro X Superlight 2
